The last time I placed an order you sent me additional product a month later. I do not want that to happen again. I only want to place an order when I need to. Is that possible?
Template used: "Cancel / edit order"; last updated: 2024-02-12 23:54:59.280

Thank you for clarifying. It sounds like you may have subscribed instead of making a one-time purchase. Make sure to opt for one-time purchase on the product page, before adding it to your cart, in order to avoid a recurring shipment. 
If you wish to cancel any current subscription, please email your request to help@mycarpe.com or feel free to call this number 888-621-0135, Monday-Friday 9am-5pm EST. Please let me know if you have any questions about our products, I'm more than happy to help you here!
